rows.description: Computus Pr: Rectoris a 2d Decr. Novr. 1817 ad eundem Recepta
rows.notes: Combined description, prioritizing gpt-5-mini's more accurate reading of the left side ('Computus Pr: 2d Decr. Novr.'). Visually verified and added 'ad eundem Recepta' which was clearly present on the right side of the header line, missed by both extractors.
rows.section_header: Computus Pr: Rectoris a 2d Decr. Novr. 1817 ad eundem Recepta

rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's description. Its notes correctly identified the faintness and ambiguity of the handwriting, and 'Diem novation' is a better visual match than 'Dom revolution'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's description. Its notes correctly described the visual consistency of 'Arrearage Receipts', which is a common ledger term and a better visual match than 'Amerage Recevta'.
Selected gpt-5-mini's description 'Money Identified'. Visually verified, the initial letter is clearly an 'I', making 'Identified' more accurate than 'Rectified'.
